NEOW.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.0-1.c: We can't live on like this! We have no food, no housing, no guidance! Who is responsible for the state of the Spire!?
NEOW.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.2-1.c: I'm... doing my best. I promise. Things will change. They must...
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKY: Are you the Architect? [blue]Mazaleth[/blue]'s people need help! They suffer down in the docks--
Their misery is self-inflicted. I have better things to do with my time.
What!? Can't you see they need help!? You cannot possibly imagine a nobler cause!
If it is nobility you seek, Nonupeipe is a few floors down. Now begone.
Architect, we are in need, if you could just assist us...!
You again? Haven't I made it clear this isn't [red]my[/red] problem?
Architect! You betray your duty to the people of the Spire!
I have no such duty. Leave, now.
[sine]Little birdling[/sine], what lovely feathers you bear! Why do you fear them so?
I never asked for them! I meant to save my people, not join them in madness!

The path to a better you isn't always charted, my dear.
May my gift help you connect with your inner self!
Welcome back, little birdling. Might you regale us with a song today before you depart? A gift for a gift!
[sine]Little birdling[/sine]! My favorite of Neow's puppets. What can I offer you this time...
Could you... not call me that anymore? Please? I'm not a bird. And I don't want to be one.
And yet I find you at your happiest when in avian company.

I-I-- That's not--
[i][font_size=22]The Valkyrie looks away, self-conscious.[/font_size][/i]
Now, now, no need to make a face. Take one of these and dry your tears, little birdling.
DARV.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.0-0.a: A new face! Bit young t'be doin' what you're doin', aintcha?
DARV.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.0-1.c: What is this place? Are you a merchant?
DARV.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.0-2.a: In a way! But these coins you've been collectin' will be no good here! How about you take somethin' now and we discuss payment later?
DARV.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.1-0.a: Ah, you're back! Now, I'm lookin' for trinkets. You got anythin' that could make our partnership worth my while?
DARV.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.1-1.c:
[i][font_size=22]The Valkyrie pulls out a worn-looking dagger.[/font_size][/i]
Will this do?
DARV.talk.THEVALKYRIE-THE_VALKYRIE.1-2.a: Ah, you're one of those people... Tell you what, I already owe you lot a favor. Let's say I keep helpin' you and that makes us even!
Wouldn't have half of my collection without the Flock. Take somethin', it might as well be yours anyway!
